Hmm...looks healthy, good weight but almost too brightly colored, maybe indicative of an issue the same way a muted colored reptile is. Also, toes are sharp, could be they are breaking the eggs accidentally.
Egg production better for sharp toed reptile but color is bright, maybe an off color compared to the healthy reptiles. Good weight.
Little lower fertility, possibly sharp toes still an issue. Still a little lighter in color than might be healthy but good weight.
Very bright color might be indicative of an issue, red seems to be lower than a less bright green. Sharp toes an issue still, probably.
Rounded toes, good for not breaking eggs accidentally and weight is good. Color is a bit muted but not as bad as others, maybe?
Good healthy color but sharp toes. Maybe color is a stronger indicator of fertility, toes not so much since it's post birth anyway.
Rounded toes still showing higher fertility and color is very bright so maybe depth and brightness is good?
Color is more muted and sharp toes. Maybe the toes lessened fertility more than the muted color but I don't know.
Yes, brighter green color is higher in numbers along with rounded toes.
Rounded toes, pretty good number and color is medium depth which is better than muted but not as good as bright.
Ok, good number and toes are rounded - color is a bright but muted green so maybe deeper breen doesn't mean as much as rounded toes.
Color is a bit muted but toes are sharp - can't really parse this one.
I wouldn't thought the darker green was more indicative of this huge number but maybe it's the rounded toes. Could be just green in general plus the rounded toes.
Rounded toes but a little lower number - still not bad! Red doesn't seem to affect it but it is a deeper red.
Green doesn't seem to be indicative of a good number, those sharp toes though
Rounded toes are the plus, color seems to matter less and less
Sharp toes, less offspring.

prompt_continuous: Reptiles varied in whether they were GREEN or RED. Did being GREEN or RED make a difference to fertility? If you did not notice this feature or believe it did not make a difference to fertility, please hit no and proceed.
question_text: Did color matter to the fertility of reptiles?

question_text: Did brightness matter to the fertility of reptiles?
